PUPPET_FILE
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      PsiElement(NAME)('unix')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiPuppetResourceDeclarationImpl(RESOURCE_DECLARATION)
        PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
          PsiElement(NAME)('file')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetBracedResourceByClassnameContentsBlockImpl(BRACED_RESOURCE_BY_CLASSNAME_CONTENTS_BLOCK)
          PsiElement({)('{')
          PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
          PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
